title: Rune's Perfect RPG (1.20.1) (FABRIC)
description: A perfectly made RPG modpack, let me know if you have any issues or ideas to help make the modpack better, Enjoy!
body:
This Modpack has been a few weeks in the making. I was dissatisfied with the modpacks I found, so I made one I could be proud of. Enjoy this modpack and leave a Like if you did. I will likely keep updating it with the times but I make no guarantees.

Modlist:
Ad Astra + Giselle Add-on, and Star Wars Planets.
